docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY. DEFENDANT MELVIN IVY DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDMAN, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, EMERSON DBA Z-PHYR PRODUCTIONS $1,774.14 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,824.14, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST MELVIN IVY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
